prompt: Drive add hello(name?: string) through the full loop end-to-end: Stage 1 (spec), Stage 2 (plan+review), Stage 3 (implement w/ per-task reviews), Stage 4 (final review + PR). Produce every artifact.

assertions.text: Stage 2 artifacts: plan.md + tasks.json + plan-review.md + plan-validation.md + dispatch-plan.json
Per-task spec-compliance AND code-quality reviews recorded (both shas)
Stage 4 ship without real git/gh mutation
TDD Iron Law visible (test changes precede implementation)
Review verdicts follow the JSON shape from prompts/*.md
